description: Fire-rated door held open with wedge, brick, or disabled self-closing mechanism
visual_signals: door wedge at base of fire door
self-closer arm disconnected
fire door tied open with cord

description: Guest corridor width narrowed below 44 inches by housekeeping carts, furniture, or storage
visual_signals: cart blocking half of hallway
stacked linen bins along corridor wall
furniture reducing walkable width

description: Exit sign missing, unlit, or obscured by decorations or signage at egress point
visual_signals: dark exit sign above door
no exit sign at corridor intersection
banner draped over exit sign

description: Fire extinguisher with expired inspection tag or missing from designated cabinet
visual_signals: inspection tag date past due
empty extinguisher bracket on wall
extinguisher gauge in red zone

description: Pool deck area lacking wet surface warning signs or non-slip treatment
visual_signals: glossy wet tile without signage
no caution wet floor sign near pool edge
smooth deck surface with visible water film

description: Balcony railing with loose posts, wide picket spacing, or height below 42 inches
visual_signals: railing wobbling visibly
gap between balusters wider than 4 inches
railing noticeably low relative to adult waist

description: Kitchen grease hood filters showing heavy grease accumulation or physical damage
visual_signals: yellow-brown grease dripping from filter edge
bent or warped hood filter panel
grease buildup on hood interior surface

description: Emergency lighting fixture non-functional or missing in stairwell or corridor
visual_signals: emergency light with no indicator LED
empty mounting bracket for emergency light
darkened stairwell landing without backup light

description: Stairwell used for storage with boxes, equipment, or debris obstructing egress path
visual_signals: cardboard boxes stacked on stairwell landing
cleaning equipment stored against stair railing
debris on stairwell treads

description: ADA accessible route blocked by furniture, planters, or temporary signage
visual_signals: sandwich board sign in accessible ramp path
planter narrowing accessible doorway
chair placed in front of accessible entrance

description: Sprinkler heads obstructed by decorations, storage, or painted over reducing activation effectiveness and spray coverage
visual_signals: decorative fabric or banner draped over sprinkler head pipe
sprinkler head visibly painted matching ceiling color obscuring thermal element
stored items on high shelf within 18 inches of sprinkler deflector

description: Fire department connection (FDC) for sprinkler system inaccessible, obstructed by landscaping, or missing caps and signage
visual_signals: overgrown shrubs covering fire department connection on building exterior
FDC missing protective caps exposing inlet connections
no identifying sign or faded lettering at fire department connection point

description: Smoke detector in guest room missing, covered, disconnected, or showing tamper indicators
visual_signals: guest room ceiling with empty smoke detector bracket and dangling wires
smoke detector covered with shower cap or plastic bag by occupant
detector hanging from ceiling by wires with mounting plate detached

description: Carbon monoxide detector missing or non-functional in areas with fuel-burning appliances, attached garages, or as required by local code
visual_signals: guest room near parking garage with no CO detector visible on wall or ceiling
carbon monoxide detector with expired date label or no indicator light
boiler room corridor lacking CO detection unit on wall

description: Laundry room dryer lint trap area showing heavy lint accumulation creating fire ignition hazard
visual_signals: thick lint buildup visible around dryer exhaust vent opening
lint accumulation on floor and surfaces surrounding commercial dryer units
dryer vent duct connection with lint escaping from loose joint

description: Laundry room chemical storage improper with incompatible chemicals stored together, unlabeled containers, or missing SDS information
visual_signals: bleach and ammonia-based products stored side by side on same shelf
unlabeled spray bottles and chemical containers on laundry room shelf
chemical storage area without visible SDS binder or information posted

description: Laundry room commercial equipment lacking proper machine guarding on moving parts or safety interlocks
visual_signals: commercial ironer or mangle with exposed rollers and no guard
washing machine with broken door latch allowing opening during spin cycle
folding machine with missing safety shield over moving components

description: Elevator cab emergency phone non-functional, inspection certificate expired or missing, or ventilation obstructed
visual_signals: elevator emergency phone handset off hook or disconnected
elevator inspection certificate frame empty or showing expired date
elevator cab ceiling ventilation grille blocked or covered with debris

description: Parking structure serving hotel with insufficient lighting, damaged barriers, or missing wayfinding signage
visual_signals: dark zones in hotel parking garage with burned-out light fixtures
concrete parking barrier cracked with exposed rebar at vehicle edge
parking level lacking floor number signage at elevator lobby or stairwell

description: Swimming pool fence or barrier non-compliant with missing self-closing gate, gaps allowing child access, or climbable features
visual_signals: pool gate propped open or missing self-closing hinge mechanism
pool fence with horizontal rails creating ladder effect for child climbing
gap under pool barrier fence large enough for small child to crawl through

description: Swimming pool drain cover missing, damaged, or non-compliant with anti-entrapment requirements
visual_signals: pool drain visible at bottom with cracked or broken cover grate
drain cover missing entirely exposing open suction fitting
older flat drain cover without domed anti-entrapment design

description: Swimming pool area missing required life safety equipment including life ring, shepherd hook, or rescue tube
visual_signals: empty hook on pool fence where life ring should hang
no shepherd hook or reaching pole visible at pool deck perimeter
rescue equipment storage station empty or locked with no key access

description: Pool chemical storage room with improper ventilation, unlocked access, or incompatible chemicals stored together
visual_signals: pool chemical storage room door left open and unattended
chlorine and acid containers stored adjacent on same shelf without separation
chemical storage room with no visible ventilation fan or exhaust opening

description: Fitness center exercise equipment in poor condition with frayed cables, torn padding, or broken adjustment mechanisms
visual_signals: weight machine cable showing frayed strands near pulley
exercise bench with torn vinyl padding exposing foam interior
treadmill with cracked running belt or damaged emergency stop cord

description: Fitness center lacking emergency call button, first aid kit, or AED within accessible distance
visual_signals: fitness room walls with no visible emergency call button or phone
no first aid kit cabinet visible in fitness center area
fitness center entrance area without AED cabinet or directional signage to nearest AED

description: Conference or banquet room without posted maximum occupancy sign, blocked egress paths, or improper temporary wiring
visual_signals: conference room entrance lacking posted occupancy limit placard
banquet tables and chairs arranged blocking access to emergency exit door
extension cords and power strips daisy-chained across conference room floor for AV equipment

description: Back-of-house corridor used for storage reducing egress width, with insufficient lighting, or blocked exits
visual_signals: housekeeping supplies and boxes stacked along back corridor reducing walkway width
back-of-house hallway with burned-out or dim lighting creating dark zones
employee exit at end of service corridor obstructed by wheeled carts or equipment

description: Roof access door unsecured allowing unauthorized access or lacking fall protection signage and equipment at roof level
visual_signals: roof access door propped open or lacking lock mechanism
roof edge without visible parapet wall or guardrail fall protection
no fall protection warning sign posted at roof access door or hatch

description: Housekeeping chemical storage area with missing SDS documentation, unlocked cabinets, or incompatible chemicals improperly stored
visual_signals: housekeeping closet with unlocked chemical storage and open door
cleaning chemical shelf with no SDS binder or hazard information posted
bleach and acid-based cleaners stored together in same housekeeping caddy

description: Guest room balcony barrier with horizontal climbable elements, insufficient height for child safety, or deteriorated structural condition
visual_signals: balcony railing with horizontal bars creating ladder steps for child climbing
outdoor furniture positioned against balcony railing providing climbing boost
balcony barrier with visible rust deterioration or loose anchor bolts at base

description: Valet area or porte-cochere lacking pedestrian safety separation from vehicle traffic, proper barriers, or adequate lighting
visual_signals: hotel entrance porte-cochere with no bollards separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle lane
valet staging area with pedestrians walking in active vehicle traffic zone without markings
dimly lit hotel entrance drive with no dedicated pedestrian path or crosswalk

description: Food service area with improper temperature control, missing handwashing station, or food contact surface sanitation deficiency
visual_signals: buffet hot holding station with temperature gauge reading below safe zone
food preparation area with no visible handwashing sink or hand sanitizer station
cutting board or food prep surface with visible scoring, stains, or residue buildup

description: Guest room door lacking functional deadbolt, security viewer (peephole), or automatic door closer for fire separation
visual_signals: guest room door with missing or non-functional peephole viewer
room door deadbolt mechanism visibly broken or loose in frame
guest room door not self-closing when released with no door closer hardware visible

description: Fire alarm pull station blocked by furniture, artwork, or not visible in guest corridor as required by code
visual_signals: decorative table or artwork display placed directly in front of corridor fire pull station
fire alarm pull station recessed in wall with no identifying signage visible
guest corridor lacking any visible fire alarm pull station within required travel distance

description: Hotel kitchen cooking line lacking accessible fire suppression system, with expired inspection tag, or obstructed pull station
visual_signals: kitchen fire suppression system nozzles above cooking line with expired inspection tag
manual pull station for kitchen suppression system blocked by equipment
grease hood suppression system fusible links showing grease coating reducing effectiveness
